scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.start:test:server: npm run db:reset:test && npm run build --workspace server && npm run start --workspace server
scripts.start:test:client: npm run build --workspace client && npm run preview --workspace client -- --host 127.0.0.1 --strictPort --port 4173
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace server && npm run lint --workspace client
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace server && npm run lint:fix --workspace client
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e
